name: hubble-recipe-viewer
description: A viewer for the mela recipe format

events.name: recipe:ready
events.description: A recipe finished AI processing and is ready to cook

events.name: recipe:active-changed
events.description: The active recipe or its phase changed

image.description: Recipe image URL or base64 data

groupName.description: Name of the current recipe group

stepIndex.description: Index of the step within the group

stepText.description: Full instruction text for this step

temperature.description: Temperature mentioned in this step, or null

endpoints.name: receive
endpoints.description: Receive a recipe from Mela app

endpoints.name: navigate-next
endpoints.description: Advance through the current phase or step (equivalent to the primary hardware button)

endpoints.name: navigate-previous
endpoints.description: Go back a step or phase (equivalent to the back hardware button)

endpoints.name: navigate-switch
endpoints.description: Cycle to the next recipe (equivalent to the switch hardware button)

endpoints.name: navigate-toggle-ingredient
endpoints.description: Toggle the ingredient at the current cursor position during the gathering phase

endpoints.name: navigate-start-timer
endpoints.description: Start the timer for the current cooking step (sets pendingTimer in emitted data)

endpoints.name: navigate-dismiss
endpoints.description: Dismiss the completed recipe from the active list

endpoints.name: get-recipe
endpoints.description: Get full details of a processed recipe by ID, including all groups, steps, ingredients, and image URL

properties.name: anthropicApiKey
properties.description: Anthropic API key for Claude AI recipe processing

properties.name: anthropicModel
properties.description: Claude model to use for recipe processing

properties.name: title
properties.description: Widget title displayed in the edit interface
